headline: Is Mohawk Industries (MHK) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Wondering whether Mohawk Industries at around US$96.94 is offering value or just another value trap? This article breaks down what the recent numbers are really saying about the stock. The share price has delivered a 1.7% return over the last 7 days, while the 30 day and year to date returns of a 9.7% decline and an 11.5% decline, and a 1 year return of a 5.1% decline, give a mixed picture for anyone thinking about timing an entry. Over a longer window, the stock shows a 2.3% return over 3...
